reference_images.label: reflect_academy_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Academy hall color rhythm, duel staging, card layout balance, and warm-versus-cool lighting anchor.

reference_images.label: reflect_academy_player
reference_images.purpose: Player silhouette, costume layering, hand pose, and magical focus posture anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use SpriteSheetBundle for the burst animation and despawn the entity when the non-looping atlas finishes.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load world/world_reflect_burst_fx_8f_160x160.png through AssetServer and build a TextureAtlasLayout with eight columns.
runtime_notes: Burst origin aligns to the reflect line rather than the projectile center to keep timing feedback stable.
Animation lasts 0.5 seconds at 16 fps and then removes itself.
Blend mode stays alpha based so UI remains readable over the effect.

context.usage: Eight-frame burst that fires on a successful reflection and marks the projectile turn point.

shape.silhouette: Circular arc burst with glass-like shards and a bright center pulse.

specs.lighting: Cyan inner core expands into gold rim sparkles over the frame sequence.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 1280x160 px with eight 160x160 frames.
Peak flash radius reaches 72 px inside frame 4 without clipping the outer shards.
Final frame fades to less than 10 percent opacity so the lane clears for the next projectile.
